headline: 5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From Cummins’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Cummins delivered a positive first quarter, as reflected by a 2.2% post-earnings stock move, with management attributing the results to strong power generation demand—especially from data centers—and solid growth in international markets. CEO Jennifer Rumsey highlighted, “Growth was driven primarily by higher demand in power generation markets, particularly from data centers.” However, North American heavy- and medium-duty truck volumes were a notable drag, offsetting some gains.
